visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a dark blue beret and an off-the-shoulder dark blue ruffled top, stands in front of a glass-fronted freezer section in a large retail store. She points towards the freezer while smiling directly at the camera. Above her, a large red and blue logo is superimposed. Yellow and white text overlays appear on the screen. (2) The camera angle remains medium-close. Another person's hands enter from the right, handing a yellow cardboard pizza box to the woman. She takes the box, which features a picture of a BBQ chicken pizza, and holds it up for the camera while continuing to speak. The background consists of rows of frozen food items behind glass doors. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor living room setting. The woman is seated at a table alongside another woman with long dark hair wearing a purple top. They are holding the pizza box and a frozen pizza sealed in clear plastic. The room is brightly lit, and plush toys are visible on a shelf in the background. (4) Close-up shots of the pizza box are shown, highlighting the brand name and product description. This is followed by a shot of the frozen pizza inside its plastic packaging, resting on top of the yellow box. White text overlays with cooking instructions appear briefly. (5) A cooked, sliced pizza is shown on a black circular tray. The slices are topped with melted cheese, chicken, and red onions. The camera uses a close-up shot to show the texture of the crust and toppings under warm indoor lighting. (6) The two women are back in the frame, sitting at the table. They are holding pizza slices and eating. The woman in the beret shows various expressive facial reactions, nodding and gesturing with her hands. Red and yellow variety-style text boxes pop up around them as they interact. (7) The camera focuses on the women as they continue their discussion, with the woman in the beret crossing her arms at one point. They look towards each other and then back at the camera. The video ends with a shot of them both looking at the camera as more text overlays appear at the bottom.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 499元值得嗎?. [Slogan]: 冷凍經典BBQ雞肉披薩. [Subtitle]: 最新的. (2) [Subtitle]: BBQ披薩. [Subtitle]: 一片只要166元. [Subtitle]: 而且還是薄皮的哦. [Subtitle]: 裡面有三片. [Subtitle]: 我們回去加熱看好不好吃. [Subtitle]: 因為它的圖看起來很好吃. [Subtitle]: 但是實體如何呢. [Subtitle]: 它不同品牌耶. (3) [Subtitle]: 他們家越來越多冷凍披薩了. [Subtitle]: 它三片是單獨包裝. [Subtitle]: 長這樣子. [Subtitle]: 還可以用氣炸鍋. [Subtitle]: 烤箱甚至微波爐. [Subtitle]: 微波爐3分鐘就可以吃. [Subtitle]: 那它是六吋的大小. [Subtitle]: 我們這個是大概半片. (4) [Subtitle]: 剛吃了幾片. [Subtitle]: 它呢聞起來. [Variety]: 超級無敵香. [Subtitle]: 它的乳酪香氣真的是哇哦. [Subtitle]: 整個房子都香噴噴. [Subtitle]: 吃起來. [Variety]: 甜. [Variety]: 超甜. [Subtitle]: 真的好甜. [Subtitle]: 它是一個非常甜的BBQ醬. [Subtitle]: 所以你喜歡那種很甜的蜜汁醬燒. [Subtitle]: 你可能會喜歡. [Subtitle]: 但是對我們而言呢有點太甜. [Subtitle]: 不過它的餅皮呢做的非常的不錯. [Subtitle]: 就是薄薄的. [Subtitle]: 然後上面有一點粉感. [Subtitle]: 我覺得吃起來很特別. [Subtitle]: 但是我還是比較喜歡上次那一個起司的. [Subtitle]: 上次起司的太好吃的. [Subtitle]: 起司薄片太好吃了. [Subtitle]: 這個我有點失望. [Subtitle]: 告訴我們. [Subtitle]: 你們最喜歡好市多哪一款披薩.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator with a beret, 1 female companion sitting at the table, and 1 pair of hands visible handing the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a dark blue beret and a dark blue off-the-shoulder ruffled blouse.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first location is inside a Costco warehouse, specifically in front of the freezer aisle with various frozen food products visible behind glass. The second location is a brightly lit indoor home living room with a white table and shelves holding plush toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effects opens the audio track, followed immediately by an upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop track with a strong 4/4 drum beat. A female voice enters with high energy and a bright pitch, speaking rapidly in Chinese. The vocal tone is extremely friendly and engaging, typical of a social media influencer. (2) The background music maintains a constant energy level. A subtle 'pop' sound effect occurs as the speaker receives an object. The female voice continues with a moderate to fast speech rate, maintaining clear articulation and a variety of pitch modulations to keep the listener's attention. (3) A digital 'ding' sound accompanies the transition to a new vocal segment. The speaker's voice is processed with a slight compression, giving it a professional broadcast feel. The music bed remains underneath her speech, perfectly balanced to be audible but not distracting. (4) As the tone shifts to excitement while reacting to scent and taste, the vocal pitch rises and the speaker's arousal increases. A series of short, playful sound effects like 'sparkles' or 'bells' punctuate the speaker's emphasized words. The acoustic environment sounds like a controlled indoor space with minimal background noise. (5) The speaker's tone becomes more evaluative and slightly lower in pitch as she gives her final verdict. The music continues to drive the rhythm of the edit. The audio track ends with the speaker's final question to the audience, maintaining high clarity and energy until the fade-out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Intro -> Prep -> Review -> Comparison -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to provide a comprehensive review of a specific frozen pizza product available at Costco. It starts with an attention-grabbing hook in the store, shows the physical product and its cooking options, and concludes with a taste test and personal comparison to help viewers decide if the product is worth its price.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the product, brand names, and detailed review of the product's features and taste.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical short-form social media editing styles with frequent cuts, bright captions, and upbeat music to maintain high engagement throughout the food review.
